scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.prettier:check: cd .. && git ls-files -z -- landing | grep -zE '\.(ts|tsx|cts|mts|js|jsx|cjs|mjs|json|json5|jsonc|css|scss|html|md|mdx|yml|yaml)$' | xargs -0 -r npx --prefix landing prettier --check
scripts.prettier:write: cd .. && git ls-files -z -- landing | grep -zE '\.(ts|tsx|cts|mts|js|jsx|cjs|mjs|json|json5|jsonc|css|scss|html|md|mdx|yml|yaml)$' | xargs -0 -r npx --prefix landing prettier --write
